---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    smooth-scroll: true
    title-block-banner: false
sidebar: false
---

```{=html}
<style>

@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');

/* ===== GLOBAL ===== */

body{
  background:#f4f6f5;
  font-family:'Inter', sans-serif;
  color:#1f2937;
}

main.content{
  max-width:1100px;
  padding-top:8px !important;
}

/* ===== NAVBAR ===== */

.navbar{
  background:#163a2d !important;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
}

.navbar-brand,
.navbar a{
  color:#f9fafb !important;
  font-weight:500;
  font-size:0.95rem;
  transition:0.2s ease;
}

.navbar a:hover{
  color:#d1fae5 !important;
}

/* ===== HERO ===== */

.hero{
  background:#1f4d3a;
  color:white;
  padding:85px 70px;
  border-radius:18px;
  margin-bottom:22px;
}

.hero h1{
  font-size:4.2rem;
  font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:-2px;
  margin-bottom:18px;
  line-height:0.95;
}

.hero-subtitle{
  color:#d1fae5;
  font-size:0.92rem;
  font-weight:600;
  letter-spacing:1.8px;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  margin-bottom:22px;
}

.hero p{
  max-width:700px;
  font-size:1.02rem;
  line-height:1.85;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,0.88);
  margin:0;
}

/* ===== CARDS ===== */

.card-box{
  background:white;
  border-radius:16px;
  padding:28px;
  border:1px solid #e5e7eb;
  height:100%;
  transition:0.2s ease;
}

.card-box:hover{
  border-color:#cbd5e1;
}

.card-box h3{
  font-size:1.08rem;
  font-weight:600;
  color:#163a2d;
  margin-bottom:16px;
}

.card-box ul{
  padding-left:18px;
  margin-bottom:16px;
}

.card-box li{
  margin-bottom:8px;
  color:#4b5563;
  line-height:1.7;
}

.card-box p{
  color:#4b5563;
  line-height:1.8;
  margin:0;
}

/* ===== STATS ===== */

.stats{
  background:white;
  border-radius:16px;
  padding:30px;
  text-align:center;
  border:1px solid #e5e7eb;
}

.stats h2{
  font-size:2.5rem;
  font-weight:700;
  color:#163a2d;
  margin-bottom:6px;
  letter-spacing:-1px;
}

.stats p{
  margin:0;
  color:#6b7280;
  font-size:0.95rem;
}

/* ===== FEATURE ===== */

.feature{
  background:white;
  border-radius:16px;
  padding:28px;
  border:1px solid #e5e7eb;
  height:100%;
}

.feature h3{
  font-size:1.08rem;
  font-weight:600;
  color:#163a2d;
  margin-bottom:14px;
}

.feature p{
  color:#4b5563;
  line-height:1.8;
  margin:0;
}

/* ===== SPACING ===== */

.spacer{
  height:18px;
}

/* ===== FOOTER ===== */

.footer{
  margin-top:34px;
  text-align:center;
  color:#6b7280;
  font-size:0.9rem;
  padding:12px;
}

.footer strong{
  color:#163a2d;
  font-weight:600;
}

</style>

::: {.hero}

Yusuf
Bora Çavdar
<div class="hero-subtitle">

Data Analytics • Machine Learning • Visualization

</div> <p> I explore data, develop analytical systems, and create visual narratives using modern data science tools. This website presents my projects, research, and analytical work developed with R and Quarto. </p>

:::

::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width="50%"}

::: {.card-box}

About
Data Analytics
Statistical Modeling
Data Visualization
Reproducible Research
Machine Learning

I focus on transforming complex datasets into clear and meaningful insights.

:::

::::

:::: {.column width="50%"}

::: {.card-box}

Current Focus
Higher Education Analytics
Interactive Dashboards
Statistical Exploration
Visualization Systems
Research Projects

Currently improving analytical storytelling and presentation design.

:::

::::

:::

<div class="spacer"></div>

::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width="33%"}

::: {.stats}

10+
<p>Projects</p>

:::

::::

:::: {.column width="33%"}

::: {.stats}

R
<p>Main Tool</p>

:::

::::

:::: {.column width="33%"}

::: {.stats}

Data
<p>Driven Thinking</p>

:::

::::

:::

<div class="spacer"></div>

::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width="33%"}

::: {.feature}

Visualization

Creating clean and modern analytical visualizations with R and ggplot2.

:::

::::

:::: {.column width="33%"}

::: {.feature}

Statistical Analysis

Exploring trends, relationships, and patterns hidden inside data.

:::

::::

:::: {.column width="33%"}

::: {.feature}

Machine Learning

Building predictive models and analytical workflows for real-world datasets.

:::

::::

:::

<div class="footer">

Built with <strong>R</strong> and <strong>Quarto</strong>

</div> ```
